pickup.name: Ignition Salts
pickup.effect: Grants fire damage to acid projectiles

encounters.trigger: A scream from the basement draws the player toward the morgue
The fallen attendant drops a key to the apothecary vault
The shade's destruction unlocks the central containment chamber

boss.name: The Grand Alchemist Abomination
boss.victory_condition: Infuse the boss with the catalyst then strike with a direct acid flask to neutralize its regenerative aura

output.objective: Purify the sanitarium by defeating the corrupted Grand Alchemist

output.setting: The decaying Whispering Woods of Oakhaven

pickup.name: Ethereal Essence Vial
pickup.effect: Coats arrows to bypass spectral armor

encounters.trigger: Opening the first crypt gate awakens the next horror

pickup.name: Sun-Touched Amulet
pickup.effect: Emits intense light that blinds the undead

encounters.trigger: Shattering the central sacrificial altar signals the final threat

pickup.name: The Heart of the Grove
pickup.effect: Used to destroy the boss's connection to the land

encounters.trigger: Placing the Heart into the boss pedestal summons the final encounter

boss.name: The Root-Bound Lich
boss.victory_condition: Impale the heart into the Lich's chest cavity

output.objective: Purify the cursed forest by defeating the Lich and ending the cycle of decay

output.setting: A collapsing zeppelin drifting over a smog-filled industrial city

encounters.trigger: Destroying the Scuttler causes an electrical surge that unlocks the cargo bay doors

encounters.hazard: Unsecured crates swinging from loose pulleys
encounters.trigger: Defeating the Automaton triggers an emergency alarm, revealing the route to the bridge

encounters.hazard: Shattered glass flooring with views of the abyss
encounters.trigger: Retrieving the key disables the boss containment field

boss.name: The Iron Architect
boss.victory_condition: Use the key to overload the boss's internal boiler core

output.objective: Stabilize the zeppelin engines and escape the descending wreck

pickup.effect: Increases movement speed and lubricates stiff machinery.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the sentry releases the security lockdown on the ventilation shafts.

pickup.name: Brass Ignition Key
pickup.effect: Allows interaction with ancient, rusted control panels.

encounters.trigger: Slaying the scorpion provides the key needed to open the Master Reactor door.

pickup.name: Core Stabilizer Node
pickup.effect: Necessary component to dismantle the boss's shield generator.

encounters.trigger: Securing the core stabilizer node disables the final dampening field guarding the boss arena.

boss.name: The Grand Automaton Overseer
boss.victory_condition: Disable the shield generator using the node then dismantle the central steam core.

output.objective: Sabotage the Master Reactor to prevent the city's collapse.

output.setting: A floating clockwork garden above a calm, misty industrial city

enemy.name: Rust-caked Automaton
enemy.weakness: Direct bash from the Aether-forged Greatshield

encounters.hazard: Leaking oil patches that slow movement

enemy.name: Clockwork Hummingbird Drone
enemy.weakness: Distraction by the High-Pressure Steam Valve

encounters.trigger: Retrieving the drone core initiates the lift to the Sun Dial Platform

enemy.name: Steam Sentinel
enemy.weakness: Deflection using the Heavy Copper Plating

encounters.hazard: Shifting floor plates that realign periodically
encounters.trigger: Using the key unlocks the final sanctum of the clockwork master

boss.name: The Grand Architect
boss.victory_condition: Use the Ancient Chronos Key to freeze the architect in place for a finisher
